text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I take cuteness to the extreme! ☆ I mean,
cuteness is like happiness, right? It's a shiny,
sparkly feeling that tugs at your heartstrings!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Hey, Big Brother... have I got your heart
racing?!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Hey, Big Sister... have I got your heart
racing?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
